title: cyperus pumilus f. membranaceus
intro: Cyperus pumilus f. membranaceus is a plant species, also known as the dwarf umbrella sedge, a type of sedge found in tropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyperus pumilus f. membranaceus include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, and can be dried and powdered for use in capsules or tinctures.
